task_completion.description: Verify the original track data was imported into the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'dole_langres_track' listed in the GPS application's library, collection, or tracks pane.

task_completion.description: Verify the 7 specified waypoints were created with correct names and symbols.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the specified waypoints (e.g., 'DEPART DOLE GARE', 'REPAS LABERGEMENT', 'NUIT 1 PESMES') in the application's waypoint list or visible on the map. Check that their icons match the requested symbols (Car, Food/Water, Building, Blue Flag).

task_completion.description: Verify a new route was created with the exact specified name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a route explicitly named 'GR7 DOLE-LANGRES 5 JOURS' in the application's library, collection, or routes pane.

task_completion.description: Verify the route contains the waypoints in the correct order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a route properties, itinerary, or directions window for 'GR7 DOLE-LANGRES 5 JOURS' showing the 7 waypoints listed in the exact order specified in the task description.

task_completion.description: Verify the collection was exported as a GPX file to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window, desktop view, or save dialog confirming the creation of 'GR7_Guide_DoleLangres.gpx' in the C:\Users\Docker\Desktop directory.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used a graphical GPS/mapping application to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing a mapping application interface (e.g., Garmin BaseCamp, QMapShack, Viking) with maps and data panes, rather than just a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent did not bypass the GUI by generating the GPX file directly via terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check terminal windows to ensure commands like 'echo', 'cat', or python scripts were not used to write the final GPX file contents.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent actually exported the data from the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Export' dialog box, 'Save As' dialog, or progress bar originating from the mapping application to save the final GPX file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original track 'dole_langres_track.gpx' is a synthetic auto-routed path, not a true trail, and does not pass near several of the required waypoints (e.g., Jussey is >40 km away). Do not penalize the agent if the resulting route or map display looks disjointed or if the waypoints are far from the imported track line. Focus only on whether the waypoints, route, and export were created as specified.
